page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A tool for masking and exploring of sequences from plant species.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for masking and exploring of sequences from plant species.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Kmasker plants is a tool for the automatic detection of sequence regions with meaningful k-mer characteristics. This can be sequences with highly abundant k-mer patterns (repeats), regions with diverging k-mer patterns between two studied WGS samples or segments with high target specificity.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Kmasker plants is a tool for the automatic detection of sequence regions with meaningful k-mer characteristics. This can be sequences with highly abundant k-mer patterns (repeats), regions with diverging k-mer patterns between two studied WGS samples or segments with high target specificity.
